Revised Code of Washington · Pension Crosswalk

The retirement systems of Washington State mapped to their governing RCW chapters and sections, over the complete RCW hierarchy. Cites link to the official code.

I. Pension Map

II. Full Code

Pension semantics mirror PENSION_MAP in lib/kits/wsl-core.js (mehrlander/web-tools); RCW hierarchy and captions from the 2025 RCW archive corpus (rcw/rcw-full.json). Self-contained: this file works saved locally, offline (links require a connection).
